en.k3d: 2 strength · 3 swims · 1 hike · 16,268 kg Hevy volume
en.eNote: No meals logged for Jul 1 – Jul 7 (last intake log: Jun 14), so the energy and burn charts assume the 2,000 kcal plan. Garmin active burn averaged 433 kcal/day, peaking 823 on Thursday's double (squats + open water). Monday was a full rest day (63 kcal) and Tuesday (Jul 7) is just starting — hack squat planned.
en.bNote: Net exercise = Garmin active calories; standing BMR 2,414. Intake assumes 2,000 kcal all seven days (none logged after Jun 14), so the implied balance ≈ −847 kcal/day is exercise-driven, not measured. Tuesday (Jul 7) just starting.
en.wNote: Bridge shows the last logged meals (Jun 12–14) — no intake was logged for the displayed week. Negative balance = deficit.
en.i1t: Thursday doubled up: squats + open water
en.i1: Thursday stacked the squat session (61 min, avg HR 114 / max 153) with a 1.1 km open-water swim in Primošten — 894 active kcal combined, the biggest day of the window.
en.i2t: Three swims kept the aerobic base
en.i2: One 2.2 km pool interval set — Wednesday's N4×4 (avg 124 / max 162, the week's peak HR) — plus two easy Primošten open-water swims (1.1 km Thu, 1.2 km Fri at avg 98). Sunday added a 7.1 km Zagreb hike (avg HR 117, 731 kcal).
en.i3: RHR held between 52 and 56 across the week and sits at 53 today; HRV eased to 43, right on its 7-day baseline. Last night was the week's best — 7h58 at score 91 off a 23:10 bedtime, with deep sleep rebounding to 1h27.
en.i4: Hevy shows this week's tonnage: Thursday's squats 7,956 kg and Saturday's trap-bar deadlift 8,312 kg — 16,268 kg across the 2 lifts. Saturday's session was logged as dumbbell deadlifts (60–100 kg), off the tracked trap-bar progression, so per-set HR peaks weren't appended to the strength chart.
en.rec: Tuesday is a planned hack-squat day. The week behind: 6 sessions across 5 active days (6h01, ~3,081 active kcal) — two strength lifts (squats 7,956 kg, trap-bar DL 8,312 kg; 16,268 kg total), three swims (a 2.2 km pool interval set plus two easy open-water swims), and Sunday's 7.1 km Zagreb hike. Monday was a full rest day. Recovery is strong: RHR sits at 53 and HRV eased to 43 (on baseline) after the week's best night — 7h58 at score 91. Go into today's hack squat fresh. Next: Wed swim intervals, Thu squat per plan.
en.foot: Data: 2026-07-01 → 2026-07-07 · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu via Freddy
en.foot2: plan: Mon swim · Tue hack squat · Wed swim intervals · Thu squat · Fri rest · Sat trap-bar DL · Sun rest/hike/bike

hr.k3d: 2 snage · 3 plivanja · 1 planinarenje · 16.268 kg Hevy volumen
hr.eNote: Nema zabilježenih obroka za 1.7. – 7.7. (zadnji unos: 14.6.), pa grafovi energije i potrošnje pretpostavljaju planskih 2.000 kcal. Garmin aktivna potrošnja prosj. 433 kcal/dan, vrhunac 823 na četvrtkovom dvostrukom (čučnjevi + otvorena voda). Ponedjeljak je bio potpuni dan odmora (63 kcal), a utorak (7.7.) tek počinje — planiran hack squat.
hr.bNote: Neto trening = Garmin aktivne kalorije; standardni BMR 2.414. Unos pretpostavlja 2.000 kcal svih sedam dana (ništa zabilježeno nakon 14.6.), pa je implicirana bilanca ≈ −847 kcal/dan posljedica treninga, ne mjerena. Utorak (7.7.) tek počinje.
hr.wNote: Most prikazuje zadnje zabilježene obroke (12.–14.6.) — za prikazani tjedan nema unosa. Negativna bilanca = deficit.
hr.i1: Četvrtak je spojio trening čučnja (61 min, prosj. puls 114 / maks 153) s plivanjem 1,1 km na otvorenom u Primoštenu — ukupno 894 aktivne kcal, najveći dan prikazanog tjedna.
hr.i2t: Tri plivanja držala su aerobnu bazu
hr.i2: Jedan bazenski interval od 2,2 km — srijedin N4×4 (prosj. 124 / maks 162, tjedni vrhunac pulsa) — plus dva lagana plivanja u Primoštenu (1,1 km čet, 1,2 km pet uz prosj. 98). Nedjelja je dodala planinarenje 7,1 km u Zagrebu (prosj. puls 117, 731 kcal).
hr.i3t: Oporavak: izvrsna noć, HRV se spustio
hr.i3: RHR se kroz tjedan kretao između 52 i 56, danas na 53; HRV se spustio na 43, točno na 7-dnevnoj osnovici. Sinoć je bila najbolja noć tjedna — 7h58 uz ocjenu 91, lijeganje u 23:10, uz povratak dubokog sna na 1h27.
hr.i4: Hevy prikazuje ovotjednu tonažu: četvrtkovi čučnjevi 7.956 kg i subotnje trap-bar mrtvo dizanje 8.312 kg — ukupno 16.268 kg kroz 2 dizanja. Subotnji trening je zabilježen kao mrtvo dizanje s bučicama (60–100 kg), izvan praćene trap-bar progresije, pa vrhovi pulsa po seriji nisu dodani na graf snage.
hr.rec: Utorak je planirani dan hack squata. Tjedan iza: 6 treninga kroz 5 aktivnih dana (6h01, ~3.081 aktivnih kcal) — dva dizanja snage (čučnjevi 7.956 kg, trap-bar MD 8.312 kg; ukupno 16.268 kg), tri plivanja (bazenski interval 2,2 km plus dva lagana na otvorenom) i nedjeljno planinarenje 7,1 km u Zagrebu. Ponedjeljak je bio potpuni odmor. Oporavak je snažan: RHR je na 53, a HRV se spustio na 43 (na osnovici) nakon najbolje noći tjedna — 7h58 uz ocjenu 91. Uđi u današnji hack squat svjež. Sljedeće: sri intervali, čet čučanj po planu.
hr.foot: Podaci: 1.7. → 7.7.2026. · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu putem Freddyja
hr.foot2: plan: pon plivanje · uto hack squat · sri intervali · čet squat · pet odmor · sub trap-bar MD · ned odmor/planina/bicikl
